requirement.title: REQ-2094
requirement.requirement: Since CAN communication errors in case of ``Ignition Status NOT equal ON'' are basically not considered and stored, for the Partial Network Operation a special CAN signal was introduced: 222-EMM_Data1_AR / Bus_Actv_Stat (message 0x2FA), 166-ECM_A13 / Bus_Actv_Stat (message 0x226).
